ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 3:00 AM to 5:00 AM UTC
ham.body:
Dear Colleagues,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance between 3:00 AM and 5:00 AM UTC on Friday, 19 May 2026. During this window the VPN service will be unavailable, which may affect remote access to internal applications.

We recommend saving any unsaved work and planning your remote sessions accordingly. If you encounter any issues after the maintenance window, please contact the IT Helpdesk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice – Action Required Immediately
spam.body:
Hello,

Our security audit has identified that your Microsoft 365 password is set to expire on 21 May 2026. To prevent account lockout and ensure uninterrupted access to all corporate resources, you must reset your password within the next 24 hours.

Please click the link below to update your credentials:
<URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your Microsoft 365 account.

Regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
